form.formComment: Useful gelding. Freshened for 50 days. Last start finished fourth of 11 starters at Newcastle All Weather on February 19 over 3300m, 7 len behind Team Player with 62kg at $19. Race before ran last at Southwell All Weather on January 1 over 2400m, 18 len behind Enemy with 61kg at $29. Sure to make his presence felt.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Suffered interference in the closing stages and got a severe bump.

form.formComment: Racing second-up today. First-up after 10 months finished second of 7 starters at this track on March 10 over 3400m, 1.3 len behind Las Canals carrying 72kg at $1.80. Previously second-up favourite; won by 1.0 len Aintree on May 16 over 3400m defeating Just A Glance with 70.5kg at $13 in a flat. Fitter and expected to go on with it.

form.formComment: Resumes from a spell after having raced just once last preparation pulled up at Doncaster on February 5 over 3300m. First up last campaign came from midfield; finished third of 10 runners at Pontefract on April 8 over 2400m, 4.5 len behind Letmeseethecolts with 60.5kg at $7.50. Worth plenty of thought.

form.formComment: Racing second-up today. Fresh up after six months finished eighth of 15 starters at Huntingdon on March 11 over 3200m, 28 len behind Blues Singer carrying 68kg at $21. Previously second-up made ground from midfield; finished fourth of 7 runners at Chester on May 8 over 2500m, 7 len behind Lady Vivian with 60kg at $10. Chance to atone.

previousStarts.runner: I C U IN MY DREAMS
I C U IN MY DREAMS

form.formComment: First-up. Finished off last campaign didn't finish the race at Wetherby January 22 over 3200m. Previously first up; 7 of 8 starters at Wetherby December 27 over 3200m, slow track; 46 len behind Indian River carrying 70kg at $51. Faces a tough task.
